SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-17-2014 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-19-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO BRING PROOF THAT $1,290 WAS LEVIED AGAINST HIS BANK ACCOUNT OR, IF IT WAS NOT PAID, JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO BRING A CASHIERS' CHECK MADE PAYABLE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,290.00. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SAYS HE INTENDS TO PAY THE FULL AMOUNT IF HE DETERMINES EARLIER THAT $1,290 HAS NOT BEEN PAID IN A LEVY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH WARRANT ISSUED ON 2/20/14 IS RECALLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
